biological_replicate: Plasma samples from PKDL patients with MAC (n = 20), POLY (n = 20), CR (n = 12) and HI (n = 12) were isolated
technical_replicate: All samples were run in triplicates.
experimental_design: MAC vs. HI, MAC vs. POLY, MAC vs. CR comparison
Samples were arranged in groups: (i) MAC vs. HI, (ii) MAC vs. POLY and (iii) MAC vs. CR
factor_value: Plasma samples from PKDL patients with MAC (n = 20), POLY (n = 20), CR (n = 12) and HI (n = 12)
number_of_technical_replicates: All samples were run in triplicates.
number_of_biological_replicates: 20 MAC PKDL patients, 20 POLY PKDL patients, 12 CR individuals, and 12 HI
number_of_samples: 20 MAC PKDL patients, 20 POLY PKDL patients, 12 CR individuals, and 12 HI
